calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petitioner Cheryl Tatums Petition For An Order To Compel Arbitration And Appoint An Arbitrator
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER TATUM CHERYL NOTICE OF PETITIONER CHERYL TATUMS PETITION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR is GRANTED. The Hon. James J. McBride is appointed as arbitrator.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
